title: Registered Boundary Flux Regimes
boundary: Exploratory boundary-flux renderer. Not a hydrodynamic solver.

phases.label: Drive loads
phases.meaning: External drive loads the boundary system.

phases.label: Boundary compresses
phases.meaning: The constrained boundary stores structured pressure.

phases.label: Focus forms
phases.meaning: Interior structure gathers into a focused release condition.

phases.label: Release emits
phases.meaning: A release event crosses the boundary.

phases.label: Trace remains
phases.meaning: The event leaves a registered aftermath.

presets.label: Stable Window
presets.meaning: Balanced boundary loading with readable carrier volume and restrained trace.

presets.label: Deep Collapse
presets.meaning: High boundary and interior compression without assuming clean release.

presets.label: Clean Release
presets.meaning: Focused crossing through the register with coherent aftermath trace.

presets.label: Degraded Boundary
presets.meaning: Overloaded boundary with noisy relationship walls and persistent disturbed trace.

presets.label: Aftertrace
presets.meaning: The release body fades while registered aftermath remains on the faces.
